description_long: This object represents a stylized jogger in motion, depicted with elongated, angular limbs and a dynamic, forward-leaning posture. The figure is primarily rendered in a glossy red material, with a small, pale head and minimal facial detail. The arms and legs are extended, suggesting a running stride, and the overall form is abstract, with exaggerated proportions and sharp, sweeping lines. The jogger's body is streamlined, with no visible clothing details except for the color differentiation between the head and body. There are no visible accessories or footwear details, and the figure's hands and feet are simplified into thin, curved extensions. The design emphasizes movement and energy, making it suitable as a modern urban art piece or stylized representation of a runner.
description: A stylized, glossy red jogger figure with elongated limbs and a dynamic running posture, featuring a small pale head and abstract, sweeping lines.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the jogger from above and slightly to the front, highlighting the angular arms and the small, pale head at the top of the red, streamlined body.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side perspective, emphasizing the extended leg and arm, as well as the sweeping, elongated form of the body.
description_view_2: View 2 is mostly obscured by a large dark area, but part of the red limb and the thin, curved extensions are visible.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a rear three-quarter view, showcasing the dynamic stride and the curvature of the limbs, with the head visible from behind.
attribute_clothing_type: None visible; the figure is rendered as a single, smooth, glossy red form without distinct clothing items.
attribute_footwear_type: None visible; feet are abstract, thin extensions without detailed footwear.
attribute_running_posture: The jogger is depicted in a dynamic running posture with a forward-leaning torso, one leg extended behind, the other bent forward, and arms in a mid-swing position, emphasizing motion and energy.
